creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
On 03/11/2012 11:00, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of textproc/sigil,
>
> Please note that PR ports/173305 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173305
>

Approved.

-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
